<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_status_effect/styles.css" /><infobox theme="status-effect-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{#if: {{{color|}}} | <span style="color:{{{color}}}">{{{name}}}</span> | {{{name}}} }}'''{{#if: {{{verb|}}} | <br/><span style="font-size: 0.75em; font-style: italic; font-weight: normal;">{{{verb}}} / {{{past_verb}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="stops_regen">
            <label>Stops Regeneration</label>
            <format>{{{stops_regen}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="stages">
            <label>Stages</label>
            <format>{{{stages}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="min_stage">
            <label>Min Stage</label>
            <format>{{{min_stage}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>Effect ID</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a status effect (Acid, Fire, Shock, …) in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox status effect
|name = Display name (e.g. "Acid")
|api_name = Internal effect ID (e.g. "el_acid")
|icon = Icon filename
|color = Hex color of the effect (e.g. "#a8ff2d")
|verb = Active verb (e.g. "Corrode")
|past_verb = Past-tense verb (e.g. "Corroded")
|stops_regen = Yes | No
|stages = Number of intensity stages
|min_stage = Stage threshold at which the effect is "applied" (0..1)
}}
</pre>

==Example Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox status effect
|name = Acid
|api_name = el_acid
|icon = Acid_icon.png
|color = #a8ff2d
|verb = Corrode
|past_verb = Corroded
|stops_regen = Yes
|stages = 5
|min_stage = 0.72
}}
</pre>
===Result===
{{Infobox status effect
|name = Acid
|api_name = el_acid
|icon = Acid_icon.png
|color = #a8ff2d
|verb = Corrode
|past_verb = Corroded
|stops_regen = Yes
|stages = 5
|min_stage = 0.72
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
